examples.title: Decision Tree Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of the Decision Tree algorithm.
examples.code:
INPUT: Dataset
OUTPUT: Decision Tree

1. Create a root node
2. Recursively partition the dataset into smaller subsets
3. Create internal nodes and leaf nodes
4. Return the Decision Tree
examples.explanation: This pseudocode implements the Decision Tree algorithm, including the recursive partitioning process and the creation of internal nodes and leaf nodes.

examples.title: Decision Tree Implementation
examples.description: A Python implementation of the Decision Tree algorithm using the scikit-learn library.
examples.code:
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier

# Create a Decision Tree classifier
clf = DecisionTreeClassifier()

# Train the classifier on the dataset
clf.fit(X, y)

# Make predictions on the test dataset
y_pred = clf.predict(X_test)
examples.explanation: This Python code implements the Decision Tree algorithm using the scikit-learn library, including training the classifier and making predictions on the test dataset.
